title: Tool Forge
description: Datapack that adds new tool/armor sets and other features to improve survival gameplay
body:
# **Tool Forge 1.21.4**
Welcome to **Tool Forge**, an in-development datapack that adds new equipment, functional blocks, and other necessary survival quality-of-life to the game!

![Tool Forge: adds new equipment and functional items, providing new variety and quality of life.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bee85add4dd5f195b88eb48853a6d0a20f8f04ec_0.webp)

### What does Tool Forge add to the game?
- **New Equipment** - as of v0.3.0, Tool Forge adds **8 new tool & armor sets** to the game, with many more on their way.
- **Equipment Grinder** - convert equipment such as tools, armor, sticks, torches, and more **into their raw crafting materials** using this functional block. Comes with options for wood and stone types for your convenience.
- **Improved Loot Tables** - Naturally spawning loot and villager trades will incorporate a wider variety of equipment to account for Tool Forge's vast additions.

### Tool Forge Requirements
- Tool Forge can only be run on version 1.21.4. There are currently no plans to support past versions, but that is subject to change.
- **Download the bundled resource pack for the best experience!** Choosing not to will not break the experience, but it is well worth the extra effort.
